rationale: In the citing paper, Lewis (2004) is used mainly as one prior loyalty-program example to summarize mixed empirical evidence and to benchmark effect sizes (e.g., noting about a 2% increase in customer revenue in that study). The citation appears in literature review and results interpretation lists, alongside several other studies, without a distinct methodological or theoretical dependency. The citing paper does not build its identification strategy, model structure, or mechanism tests on Lewis (2004), relying instead on its own DD plus GRF framework.
